hooks.command: echo "[HOOK] Bash tool about to run: $(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | node -e "process.stdin.resume();let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{console.log(JSON.parse(d).command.substring(0,80))}catch{console.log('(unknown)')}})") >> logs/claude-activity.log 2>/dev/null || true

echo "[HOOK] File written: $(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | node -e "process.stdin.resume();let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{console.log(JSON.parse(d).file_path)}catch{console.log('(unknown)')}})") at $(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)" >> logs/claude-activity.log 2>/dev/null || true

echo "[HOOK] File edited: $(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | node -e "process.stdin.resume();let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{console.log(JSON.parse(d).file_path)}catch{console.log('(unknown)')}})") at $(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)" >> logs/claude-activity.log 2>/dev/null || true
echo "[HOOK] Claude session ended at $(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)" >> logs/claude-activity.log 2>/dev/null || true
